name: wiki.create_page
description: Create a new wiki page with frontmatter and markdown body. Returns lint warnings for the domain after creation so you can self-correct.

page_type.description: Page type. Infra: reference | howto | architecture | troubleshooting | practice. Research: entity | concept | evaluation-summary | synthesis | contradiction. AI-Learning: concept | technology | pattern | glossary | in-practice | learning-path.

extra_frontmatter.description: Additional frontmatter fields (e.g., difficulty, sources, applies_to, tags)
